preferred_name_ml.fr: Indicateur de visée de pression différentielle du type à piston

definition: pressure sight indicator that uses the pressure induced movement of a floating piston/magnet to give a qualitative indication of differential pressure

definition_ml.en: pressure sight indicator that uses the pressure induced movement of a floating piston/magnet to give a qualitative indication of differential pressure
definition_ml.fr: indicateur de visée de pression utilisant le mouvement induit par la pression d'un piston/aimant flottant pour fournir une indication qualitative d'une pression différentielle
definition_ml.de: Drucksichtanzeiger, der die druckinduzierte Bewegung eines schwimmenden Kolbens/Magneten nutzt, um eine qualitative Anzeige eines Differenzdrucks zu geben

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: pressure sight indicator that uses the pressure induced movement of a floating piston/magnet to give a qualitative indication of differential pressure
